name: Cherry Surprises
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F. Grease baking sheets.
2. Prepare cookie mix following package directions. Shape a thin layer of dough around each candied cherry. Place the cookies about 2 inches apart on greased baking sheets. Bake at 375°F for 8 minutes until set but not browned. Cool for 1 minute on baking sheets, then remove to cooling racks and cool completely.
3. Place chocolate chips and shortening in a small resealable plastic bag; seal. Place the bag in a bowl of hot water for several minutes. Dry with a paper towel. Knead until blended and chocolate is smooth. Snip a pinpoint hole in the corner of the bag. Drizzle chocolate over cookies. Allow drizzle to set before storing between layers of waxed paper in an airtight container.
Makes 3 to 3 1/2 dozen cookies
Tip: Well-drained maraschino cherries may be substituted for candied cherries.
